title: festuca altaica subsp. scabrella
intro: Festuca altaica subsp. scabrella, also known as Scabrella, is a species of grass within the genus Festuca. It is used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antioxidant effects. The health benefits of Scabrella include its ability to treat digestive issues, reduce fever, and alleviate respiratory problems such as bronchitis and asthma. Scabrella can be prepared as a decoction, infusion, or tincture, and is often used in combination with other herbs to enhance its medicinal properties.
